command: Run Bronze to Silver Trafico Datos
Invoca la aplicacion OCI Data Flow que procesa Bronze a Silver para trafico de datos.
command_shell: 'docker' 'run' '--rm' '-v' 'D:\dev\oci-medallion-codex-factory:/workspace' '-v' 'D:\dev\oci-medallion-codex-factory\.local\oci:/mnt/oci' '-w' '/workspace' '-e' 'OCI_CLI_CONFIG_FILE=/mnt/oci/config' '-e' 'OCI_CLI_SUPPRESS_FILE_PERMISSIONS_WARNING=True' 'ghcr.io/oracle/oci-cli:latest' 'data-integration' 'task' 'create-task-from-dataflow-task' '--workspace-id' 'ocid1.disworkspace.oc1..exampleuniqueID' '--name' 'Run Bronze to Silver Trafico Datos' '--identifier' 'RUN_BRONZE_TO_SILVER_TRAFICO_DATOS' '--key' 'RUN_BRONZE_TO_SILVER_TRAFICO_DATOS_KEY' '--description' 'Invoca la aplicacion OCI Data Flow que procesa Bronze a Silver para trafico de datos.' '--registry-metadata' '{"aggregatorKey": "b3b4fb2c-814f-4f14-abd6-07a3f6d3f7f3", "registryVersion": 1}' '--parent-ref' '{"parent": "b3b4fb2c-814f-4f14-abd6-07a3f6d3f7f3", "rootDocId": "ocid1.disworkspace.oc1..exampleuniqueID"}' '--dataflow-application' '{"applicationId": "ocid1.dataflowapplication.oc1..exampleuniqueID", "compartmentId": "ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleuniqueID"}'
